locations.name: 菲利普·斯克莱特
locations.summary: 菲利普·勒特利·斯克莱特（英語：Philip Lutley Sclater，1829年11月4日—1913年6月27日）是一位英国律师和动物学家，主要从事鳥類學研究，开创性地建立了动物地理学分区。 参考资料 外部链接 维基共享资源上的相關…

locations.id: loc-國際自然保護聯盟瀕危物種紅色名錄-ddaff039
locations.name: 國際自然保護聯盟瀕危物種紅色名錄
locations.summary: 國際自然保護聯盟瀕危物種紅色名錄（或稱IUCN紅色名錄，簡稱紅皮書）於1963年開始編製，是全球動植物物種保護現狀最全面的名錄。此名錄由國際自然保護聯盟編製及維護。 IUCN紅色名錄是根據嚴格準則去評估數以千計物種及亞種的絕種風險所編製而…

locations.name: 新不列顛
locations.summary: 新不列顛岛（英語：New Britain）是巴布亚新几内亚俾斯麦群岛的主要岛屿之一，介乎主島與新愛爾蘭之間，面积36,520平方公里，是世界第39大岛。 基於行政便利，本島分為東、西兩個省： 東新不列顛省，省會在科科波； 西新不列顛省，省…

relations.subject: Pied cuckoo-dove
relations.evidence: The only known nest was a simple structure made of twigs, found in May 1930 on a ledge overhanging a stream flowing through rocky terrain on the island of New Britain

relations.subject: Pied cuckoo-dove

relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

relations.subject: Pied cuckoo-dove
relations.evidence: It is mainly threatened by high levels of logging, although hunting may also present a threat. It was previously considered to be of least concern as the decline in its population was not thought to be high enough for a threatened listing, but was raised to near-threatened in 2008 following estimates of a more rapid fall in its population caused by intense deforestation in lowland forests throughout its range. More recent studies have found that the species is moderately tolerant of habitat degradation and have suggested that it be categorised as being of least concern again
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
